---
title: "Ophthalmic Measurement Support"
description: "Eye-position monitoring and image-analysis methods that support more reliable ophthalmic measurements."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/items/embedded-camera.html"
date: 2025-01-01
categories: [Ophthalmic instrumentation, Imaging, Artificial intelligence]
---

::: {.status-pill}
Research direction
:::

## Research context

The quality of an ophthalmic measurement depends not only on the instrument, but also on eye position and image quality during acquisition.

## Current work

OptoLAB investigates real-time eye-position monitoring and automated ocular-image analysis. Public outputs include the OptoCheck approach for monitoring eye position during ophthalmic examinations, image classification for ophthalmic measurement systems and the PopEYE infrared ocular-image dataset.

## Selected outputs

- [OptoCheck institutional record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1386368)
- [Vision-based eye image classification](https://doi.org/10.3390/s23010386)
- [PopEYE dataset record](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1395150)
- [Educational embedded-camera resource](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/esp32-s3-camera-gui)
